description: Pre-Session B term classification for fear (reg 61). Applies all extract, extract_thin, xref, delete, and candidate_delete confirmations established during pre-analysis. Covers: pre-analysis flags 1-4, Group J decisions, Group A genuine fear vocabulary (35 terms), Group B cross-registry terms (8 terms), Group C-I bleed deletions (~66 terms), and correction of G7949 candidate_delete->extracted_thin.

operations.description: H7200B ra.ah — confirm delete. High-frequency anchor bleed. del_flag already set. Correcting mti status to match.

set.exclusion_reason: High-frequency anchor bleed. ra.ah root (to see) entered registry via STEP relatedNos. 425 verses all show 'God saw / they saw' content. No fear content. Pre-analysis flag 1.
set.status_note: Confirmed delete by researcher 2026-03-25.

operations.description: H5590 sa.ar — confirm delete. Storm/rage sub-gloss, not fear. del_flag already set.

set.exclusion_reason: Storm/tempest sub-gloss of sa.ar root. Not a fear term. Pre-analysis flag 3.
set.status_note: Confirmed delete by researcher 2026-03-25.

operations.description: H6343 pa.chad — promote to extracted. Pre-analysis flag 2 (partially applied; this term was missed). GOD_AS_SUBJECT=1, SOMATIC_INNER_LINK=1, 48 verses. 'Fear of Isaac' divine title (Gen 31:42).

set.status_note: Pre-analysis flag 2 — unclassified genuine term with 48 verses. Promoted 2026-03-25.

operations.description: G7949 katafobos [fear] — correct from candidate_delete to extracted_thin. Signal 1 filter staged correctly; human decision is EXTRACT. kata+phobos compound = very afraid / filled with fear.

set.status_note: Genuine Greek fear compound (kata+phobos). 1 occurrence, no verses returned by STEP. Thin annotation. Corrected from candidate_delete 2026-03-25.

notes: Groups C-I bleed deletions applied in bulk based on root-family analysis confirmed in pre-analysis.
All candidate_delete terms resolved: G2313->delete, G7949->extracted_thin, H3070->delete, H7207->delete.
H4172B mo.rah already corrected to extracted_thin in previous patch — not repeated here.
H3372H and H3373 already extracted in previous patch — not repeated here.
Terms with existing del_flag=1 (H7200B, H5590, H2844, H2119) have mti status updated to 'delete' for consistency.
After patch: ~86 extracted/extracted_thin, 8 xref, ~77 delete, 0 unresolved None-status in pre-analysis scope.
